description: Source quality tier definitions for puzzle adapters. Scale: 1=Unrated to 5=Professional.

5.name: Professional
5.criteria: Curated by professional Go players, verified solutions, rich metadata

4.name: High
4.criteria: Quality collections from known sources, minor inconsistencies acceptable

3.name: Standard
3.description: Decent quality, needs validation, some inconsistencies
3.criteria: Reasonable quality, may need additional validation in pipeline

2.name: Variable
2.criteria: Crowdsourced or automated, significant quality variance

1.name: Unrated
1.criteria: New sources, quality unknown, use with caution
